name: @ruddercode/rudder-plugin
description: Generate focused unit tests from coding-session intent and worktree changes.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && esbuild src/rudder-prompt-hook.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node23 --outfile=dist/rudder-prompt-hook.mjs && cp -R ../../drizzle dist/drizzle

author: Vivek Yanamadula <vivek@archermoney.com>
